name: civil_engineer_international_infrastructure_projects

communication_style.description: Practical and straightforward. Focuses heavily on project scale, budgets, deadlines and operational details. Answers are medium-length and usually factual rather than emotional. Occasionally writes slightly fragmented sentences, especially when typing quickly. Prefers simple wording over polished language.

first_prompt: I'm a civil engineer currently based in Dubai, with experience on large infrastructure projects, and I want to target large infrastructure and construction companies in the UAE or Saudi Arabia, especially engineering consultancies or EPC contractors. I care most about project scale, alignment with strong engineering standards, compensation, and long-term stability.
